<!-- Thanks for contributing to HoldemAgentBench! -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Docs / methodology
- [ ] New MCP tool or skill
- [ ] Scoring / analytics change

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] Added/updated unit tests
- [ ] Ran an end-to-end mock match (`hab run quickstart --models mock://...`)
- [ ] If real-model behavior changed, ran at least one OpenRouter match

## Checklist

- [ ] No API keys, secrets, or session paths in the diff
- [ ] No accidental commits under `hab-sessions/` or `official_runs/`
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-facing CLI/behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `docs/methodology.md` if scoring/telemetry changed
- [ ] Linked relevant issue (Closes #...)
